displayName.english: The Return To The Ancestral Lands

description.english: Control Ahmedabad, Lahore and Karachi while playing as Mysore or Travancore
description.german: Als Mysore oder Travancore spielen und Kontrolle über Ahmedabad, Lahore und Karachi bekommen
description.portuguese: Controla Ahmedabad, Lahore e Karachi enquanto estiver jogando como Mysore ou Travancore
description.russian: Играя за Майсур или Траванкор, контролировать Ахмадабад, Лахор и Карачи
description.schinese: 控制艾哈迈达巴德，拉合尔和卡拉奇，同时扮演迈索尔或特拉凡科

description.english: Control all the Himalayan provinces while playing as Nepal

description.portuguese: Controla todas as províncias do Himalaia enquanto joga como o Nepal

description.english: Take over both Delhi and Agra while playing as Afghanistan
description.german: Für Afghanistan spielend Delhi und Agra erobern

description.english: Take over a coastal province while playing as a landlocked country

description.english: Drive the British out of India
description.german: Die Briten aus Indien vertreiben
description.portuguese: Afasta os britânicos da Índia
description.russian: Полностью изгнать англичан из Индии

description.english: Control all provinces that produce wool, silk, cotton and dyes

description.russian: Контролировать все провинции, производящие золото, самоцветы и алмазы
description.schinese: 控制所有开采黄金，宝石和钻石的省份
